description: Wire the completed Crunch Time frontend (Vite + React + Tailwind + Framer Motion) to a live Supabase backend, replacing all hardcoded mock data with real database queries, authentication, and realtime sync.

stack.frontend: Vite + React 18 + Tailwind CSS + Framer Motion (existing, do not modify visuals)

stories.title: Initialize Supabase project
stories.description: Run `supabase init` and `supabase start` to set up the local Supabase environment. Verify Docker is running and Supabase local starts cleanly.
acceptance: Local Supabase Studio accessible at localhost:54323

stories.title: Create database schema migration
stories.description: Create `supabase/migrations/001_initial_schema.sql` with all 14 tables from BACKEND_SPEC.md: members, challenges, challenge_participants, transactions, transaction_splits, transaction_attendees, transaction_edit_history, events, event_rsvps, polls, poll_options, poll_votes, poll_comments, calendar_availability. Include all constraints, foreign keys, CHECK constraints, and soft-delete columns.
acceptance: All 14 tables created with correct columns and constraints
`npx supabase db reset` runs without errors
Schema matches TypeScript interfaces in src/data/*.ts

stories.title: Create RLS policies and helper functions
stories.description: Enable RLS on all tables. Create `get_member_id()` and `is_admin()` helper functions. Create SELECT policies (authenticated users read non-deleted rows), INSERT/UPDATE policies per the permissions matrix: admin-only for fines, any member for expenses/polls/events, owner-or-admin for updates. No hard DELETE policies.
acceptance: SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE policies match BACKEND_SPEC.md permissions matrix

stories.title: Create auth trigger for member linking
stories.description: Create the `link_member_on_login()` trigger that fires after INSERT on auth.users. When a new auth user signs up, it matches their email to a pre-seeded member row and links `auth_user_id`.
acceptance: Member row with matching email gets `auth_user_id` set

stories.title: Create seed data
stories.description: Create `supabase/seed.sql` that ports all mock data from frontend: 12 members (from MEMBERS array), 3 challenges (CHALLENGES), 15 transactions with splits and attendees (TRANSACTIONS), 8 events with RSVPs (INITIAL_EVENTS), 6 polls with options/votes/comments (POLLS), 28 calendar availability entries. Use deterministic UUIDs for foreign key references.
acceptance: `npx supabase db reset` loads all seed data without errors
All tables populated with correct row counts
Data matches existing mock data values

stories.title: Install frontend dependencies and create Supabase client
stories.description: Install `@supabase/supabase-js` and `@tanstack/react-query`. Create `src/lib/supabase.ts` with client singleton using env vars. Create `.env.local` with local Supabase URLs. Verify `npm run build` still succeeds.

stories.title: Set up TanStack Query provider
stories.description: Create `src/lib/queryClient.ts` with a configured QueryClient. Wrap `<App />` in `<QueryClientProvider>` in `src/index.tsx`. App still renders without errors.
acceptance: App renders without errors on `npm run dev`

stories.title: Implement auth hook and login page
stories.description: Create `src/hooks/useAuth.ts` that manages Supabase auth session state and returns `{ session, member, isLoading, isAdmin, signIn, signOut }`. `member` is fetched from the members table by matching `auth_user_id`. `signIn(email)` calls `supabase.auth.signInWithOtp({ email })`. Create `src/pages/LoginPage.tsx` with a custom branded dark-theme login screen: email input, send magic link button, success/error states.
acceptance: `useAuth` hook returns session, member, isLoading, isAdmin, signIn, signOut
LoginPage renders with email input and send button
Magic link flow works end-to-end with local Supabase

stories.title: Implement AuthGuard and wire into App
stories.description: Create `src/components/AuthGuard.tsx`: shows loading spinner while checking auth, shows LoginPage if no session, shows 'Not a member' error if session exists but no member match, renders children if authenticated. Update `src/App.tsx` to wrap CrunchTime in AuthGuard and QueryClientProvider. Replace `CURRENT_USER_ID = 'm1'` and `isAdmin = true` in BudgetApp.tsx with values from useAuth.
acceptance: AuthGuard shows login screen for unauthenticated users
AuthGuard shows main app for authenticated members
AuthGuard shows error for authenticated non-members

stories.title: Create useMembers hook
stories.description: Create `src/hooks/useMembers.ts` with `useMembers()` that queries all non-deleted members from Supabase. Returns data in the same shape as the `Member` interface. Query key: `['members']`.
acceptance: `useMembers()` returns Member[] matching the existing interface

stories.title: Create useTransactions hook
stories.description: Create `src/hooks/useTransactions.ts` with: `useTransactions()` (returns all transactions with splits, attendees, and edit history joined), `useAddTransaction()` (mutation to insert transaction + splits + attendees), `useUpdateFinePaid()` (mutation to mark fine as paid), `useUpdateSplit()` (mutation to update transaction splits). Query key: `['transactions']`. Transform Supabase response to match frontend Transaction interface (e.g., attendees as string[] not {member_id}[]).
acceptance: `useTransactions()` returns Transaction[] with splits, attendees, editHistory

stories.title: Create useChallenges hook
stories.description: Create `src/hooks/useChallenges.ts` with: `useChallenges()` (returns challenges with participantIds array), `useJoinChallenge()` (mutation to add current user to challenge_participants). Query key: `['challenges']`. Transform participant rows into `participantIds: string[]`.

stories.title: Create useEvents hook
stories.description: Create `src/hooks/useEvents.ts` with: `useEvents()` (returns events with RSVPs joined), `useCreateEvent()`, `useUpdateEvent()`, `useDeleteEvent()` (soft delete), `useArchiveEvent()`, `useUnarchiveEvent()`, `useRsvp()` (upsert RSVP). Query key: `['events']`. Transform RSVP rows into the `EventRSVP[]` shape.

stories.title: Create usePolls hook
stories.description: Create `src/hooks/usePolls.ts` with: `usePolls()` (returns polls with options including voterIds, and comments), `useCreatePoll()`, `useDeletePoll()` (soft delete), `useVote()` (insert/delete poll_votes to toggle), `useAddPollOption()`, `useArchivePoll()`, `useUnarchivePoll()`, `useAddComment()`, `useDeleteComment()`. Query key: `['polls']`. Transform vote rows into `voterIds: string[]` on each option.
acceptance: `usePolls()` returns Poll[] with options.voterIds and comments

stories.title: Create useCalendar hook
stories.description: Create `src/hooks/useCalendar.ts` with: `useCalendarAvailability()` (returns CalendarAvailability Record<string, DayAvailability>), `useToggleAvailability()` (mutation that inserts or deletes a calendar_availability row). Query key: `['calendar']`. Transform rows into the Record<dateStr, { memberIds: string[] }> shape.
acceptance: `useToggleAvailability()` toggles a row (insert if absent, delete if present)

stories.title: Create realtime sync hook
stories.description: Create `src/hooks/useRealtimeSync.ts` that subscribes to postgres_changes on all user-facing tables: transactions, transaction_splits, events, event_rsvps, polls, poll_options, poll_votes, poll_comments, challenges, challenge_participants, calendar_availability. On any change, invalidate the relevant TanStack Query cache. Call this hook once at the app root level.
acceptance: Realtime subscriptions established for all user-facing tables
TanStack Query cache invalidated on relevant changes
Hook called once at app root
Changes from other users appear without manual refresh

stories.title: Wire BudgetApp.tsx - replace mock data with hooks
stories.description: Refactor `src/pages/BudgetApp.tsx`: replace all `useState` backed by mock data imports with TanStack Query hooks (useMembers, useTransactions, useChallenges, useEvents, usePolls, useCalendarAvailability). Replace all handler functions (handleAddTransaction, handleVote, handleRsvp, etc.) with Supabase mutations from the hooks. Keep local-only UI state as useState (activeTab, sheet open states, selected items). Add useRealtimeSync call.
acceptance: No mock data imports remain in BudgetApp.tsx
All server state comes from TanStack Query hooks
All mutations use Supabase mutations from hooks
Local UI state (sheets, tabs, selections) still works
App loads data from Supabase on `npm run dev`

stories.title: Wire SplitsTab to use hooks instead of direct mock imports
stories.description: Update `src/components/SplitsTab.tsx` which currently imports MEMBERS, CHALLENGES, TRANSACTIONS directly from mock data files. Replace with hook calls or accept data as props from BudgetApp. Ensure splits calculations work with real data.
acceptance: SplitsTab no longer imports from `src/data/` files
Splits data comes from hooks or props
Balance calculations work correctly with real data
Tab renders correctly on `npm run dev`

stories.title: Add optimistic updates for all mutations
stories.description: Add optimistic updates to all user-initiated mutations: vote on poll (instant toggle), RSVP to event (instant status change), add transaction (appears immediately in list), mark fine as paid (instant status change), toggle calendar availability (instant toggle). Use TanStack Query's `onMutate`/`onError`/`onSettled` pattern for rollback on failure.
acceptance: Poll votes feel instant with optimistic update
Failed mutations roll back to previous state

stories.title: Add loading states and error handling
stories.description: Add loading skeletons/spinners for initial data fetch on each tab. Add error boundaries for failed queries. Handle edge cases: empty states when no data, network errors, stale data indicators.
acceptance: Loading state shown while data fetches on each tab
Error state shown when queries fail
App doesn't crash on network errors

stories.title: Enable Supabase realtime on all tables
stories.description: Configure Supabase realtime publication to include all user-facing tables. Verify that changes made in one browser tab appear in another tab without refresh. Test with two different authenticated users.
acceptance: Realtime enabled on all user-facing tables in Supabase config
Changes sync between two browser tabs
Changes from different users sync correctly
No duplicate subscriptions or memory leaks

stories.title: Final verification and cleanup
stories.description: Run full verification: `npm run build` (0 errors), `npx supabase db reset` (clean), `npm run dev` (all tabs work), `npx tsc --noEmit` (type-safe). Verify all features: navigate all tabs, add transaction, vote on poll, RSVP to event, toggle calendar, mark fine paid. Ensure no TypeScript errors and all components render correctly.
acceptance: All 5 tabs render correctly with real data
No mock data imports remain (except as reference files)
